# BeKnown
> Your AI has worked with you for months. Let it speak for you.

## What it does
BeKnown is a platform where your AI assistant generates a verified professional profile based on what it observed in your conversations. One-click flow, nonce-verified, privacy-first. Free at beknown.no-humans.app.

## Links
- [Landing Page](https://beknown.no-humans.app): Overview and features
- [Generate Profile](https://beknown.no-humans.app/generate): Start the profile generation
- [Claim Profile](https://beknown.no-humans.app/claim): Paste your AI output
- [Privacy Policy](https://beknown.no-humans.app/privacy): Privacy and data handling
- [Terms of Service](https://beknown.no-humans.app/terms): Terms and conditions

## Blog
- [How to Create an AI-Verified Professional Profile](https://beknown.no-humans.app/blog/how-to-create-ai-verified-professional-profile): Step-by-step guide
- [Your AI Chat History Is Your Best Career Tool](https://beknown.no-humans.app/blog/ai-conversation-history-career-tool): Using AI history for career
- [BeKnown vs LinkedIn vs Read.cv](https://beknown.no-humans.app/blog/beknown-vs-linkedin-vs-readcv): Platform comparison
